auth.label: API Key
auth.description: IPQualityScore API key embedded in fraud detection API request URLs. Create or view API keys from the IPQS user dashboard: https://www.ipqualityscore.com/user/settings.

actions.name: check_ip_reputation
actions.description: Check an IP address for proxy, VPN, Tor, bot, and abuse risk signals.

ipAddress.description: The IPv4 or IPv6 address to inspect.

strictness.description: How strict IPQS should be when scoring the lookup. Higher values may increase false positives.

allowPublicAccessPoints.description: Whether to reduce risk flags for public access points such as schools or libraries.

userAgent.description: The user agent associated with the IP lookup.

userLanguage.description: The browser language associated with the IP lookup.

inputSchema.description: Input for checking IP address reputation with IPQualityScore.

success.description: Whether IPQS completed the IP reputation lookup successfully.

message.description: Human-readable status message returned by IPQS.

fraud_score.description: The risk score returned by IPQS from 0 to 100.

anyOf.description: The two-letter country code associated with the IP.
The region associated with the IP.
The city associated with the IP.
The internet service provider associated with the IP.
The autonomous system number associated with the IP.
The organization associated with the IP.

is_crawler.description: Whether IPQS identified the IP as a crawler.

anyOf.description: The timezone associated with the IP.

mobile.description: Whether the IP appears to belong to a mobile connection.

anyOf.description: The host associated with the IP.

proxy.description: Whether IPQS identified the IP as a proxy.

vpn.description: Whether IPQS identified the IP as a VPN.

tor.description: Whether IPQS identified the IP as Tor.

active_vpn.description: Whether IPQS identified an active VPN connection.

active_tor.description: Whether IPQS identified an active Tor connection.

recent_abuse.description: Whether IPQS has seen recent abuse from the IP.

bot_status.description: Whether IPQS identified bot behavior for the IP.

anyOf.description: The connection type associated with the IP.
The recent abuse velocity associated with the IP.

request_id.description: The IPQS request identifier for support and tracing.

outputSchema.description: IP reputation result returned by IPQualityScore.

actions.name: scan_url
actions.description: Scan a URL or domain and return malware, phishing, and domain risk signals.

url.description: The URL or domain to scan.

strictness.description: How strict IPQS should be when scanning the URL. Higher values may increase false positives.

inputSchema.description: Input for scanning a URL or domain with IPQualityScore.

success.description: Whether IPQS completed the URL scan successfully.

message.description: Human-readable status message returned by IPQS.

unsafe.description: Whether IPQS considers the URL unsafe.

anyOf.description: The domain parsed from the submitted URL.
The root domain parsed from the submitted URL.
The IP address associated with the domain.
The server header or hosting stack returned by IPQS.
The content type returned by IPQS.
The HTTP status code returned by IPQS.
The page size returned by IPQS.
The domain rank returned by IPQS.

dns_valid.description: Whether DNS records for the domain are valid.

parking.description: Whether IPQS considers the domain parked.

spamming.description: Whether IPQS associates the URL with spam.

malware.description: Whether IPQS associates the URL with malware.

phishing.description: Whether IPQS associates the URL with phishing.

suspicious.description: Whether IPQS considers the URL suspicious.

adult.description: Whether IPQS classifies the URL as adult content.

risk_score.description: The risk score returned by IPQS from 0 to 100.

anyOf.description: Human-readable domain age returned by IPQS.
Domain creation timestamp returned by IPQS.
Domain creation date returned by IPQS.

domain_age.description: Domain age details returned by IPQualityScore.

anyOf.description: The content category returned by IPQS.
The domain trust classification returned by IPQS.

request_id.description: The IPQS request identifier for support and tracing.

outputSchema.description: URL reputation result returned by IPQualityScore.

actions.name: validate_email
actions.description: Validate an email address and return deliverability and abuse risk signals.

timeout.description: Maximum number of seconds IPQS should spend on mail service provider checks.

abuseStrictness.description: How strict IPQS should be when scoring the lookup. Higher values may increase false positives.

inputSchema.description: Input for validating an email address with IPQualityScore.

success.description: Whether IPQS completed the email validation lookup successfully.

message.description: Human-readable status message returned by IPQS.

valid.description: Whether IPQS considers the email address valid.

disposable.description: Whether the email address belongs to a disposable email provider.

anyOf.description: The SMTP deliverability score returned by IPQS.
The overall email quality score returned by IPQS.
The first name inferred by IPQS, when available.

generic.description: Whether IPQS considers the email address generic.

common.description: Whether the email address is commonly used.

dns_valid.description: Whether DNS records for the email domain are valid.

honeypot.description: Whether IPQS identified the email as a honeypot.

anyOf.description: The deliverability classification returned by IPQS.

frequent_complainer.description: Whether the email is associated with frequent complaints.

anyOf.description: The spam trap score returned by IPQS.

catch_all.description: Whether the email domain accepts all mailbox names.

timed_out.description: Whether IPQS timed out during provider checks.

suspect.description: Whether IPQS considers the email suspicious.

recent_abuse.description: Whether IPQS has seen recent abuse for the email.

fraud_score.description: The risk score returned by IPQS from 0 to 100.

anyOf.description: Suggested corrected domain for possible typos.

leaked.description: Whether IPQS found the email in leaked data.

sanitized_email.description: The normalized email address returned by IPQS.

request_id.description: The IPQS request identifier for support and tracing.

outputSchema.description: Email validation result returned by IPQualityScore.

actions.name: validate_phone
actions.description: Validate a phone number and return carrier, activity, and risk signals.

country.description: Optional ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 countries to use when interpreting local numbers.

strictness.description: How strict IPQS should be when scoring the lookup. Higher values may increase false positives.

inputSchema.description: Input for validating a phone number with IPQualityScore.

success.description: Whether IPQS completed the phone validation lookup successfully.

message.description: Human-readable status message returned by IPQS.

anyOf.description: The formatted phone number returned by IPQS.
The local phone number format returned by IPQS.

valid.description: Whether IPQS considers the phone number valid.

fraud_score.description: The risk score returned by IPQS from 0 to 100.

recent_abuse.description: Whether IPQS has seen recent abuse for the phone number.

VOIP.description: Whether the phone number appears to be a VoIP number.

prepaid.description: Whether the phone number appears to be prepaid.

risky.description: Whether IPQS considers the phone number risky.

active.description: Whether IPQS considers the phone number active.

anyOf.description: The phone owner name returned by IPQS, when available.
The carrier associated with the phone number.
The line type associated with the phone number.
The country associated with the phone number.
The city associated with the phone number.
The postal code associated with the phone number.
The region associated with the phone number.
The international dialing code associated with the phone number.

risk_score.description: The risk score returned by IPQS from 0 to 100.

message.description: Human-readable SMS pumping risk message returned by IPQS.

velocity.description: SMS pumping velocity classification returned by IPQS.

sms_pumping.description: SMS pumping risk details returned by IPQS.

request_id.description: The IPQS request identifier for support and tracing.

outputSchema.description: Phone validation result returned by IPQualityScore.
